items.briefing:
Australian authorities have issued a warning about a global hacking campaign targeting websites running vulnerable content management systems (CMS) like WordPress. Organisations running outdated or unpatched websites should treat this as urgent. Separately, Australian businesses are rapidly adopting AI tools, but security experts warn this is outpacing proper risk management — staff should be cautious about what sensitive information they enter into AI platforms.

**Practical tip:** Check with your IT team that your organisation's website software and plugins are fully up to date — outdated CMS platforms are a primary target in the current campaign.

featured.title: Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: Australian authorities warn of global CMS attacks targeting local organizations and infrastructure.
